subcodes.first_line: O Son of the Messenger of God! In an authentic tradition it is recorded that a certain person inquired of His Holiness the Prince of the Faithful, peace be upon Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابن رسول الله در روایت صحیحه وارد که شخصی از حضرت امیر علیه السلام سوال
subcodes.subjects: @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @Imam 'Ali, @station of the Manifestation of God, @miracles and their interpretation, @power of the Manifestation of God
